org.docgene.model

Class XMLCategoryReference

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLCategoryReference
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.ElementReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLCategoryReference
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.ElementReference
    Represent an internal reference to a category description.

    Example

     <catRef id="mycat" desc="the description" />
    This links to the category which ID is "mycat".

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE
